column1: # Each row defines CRAC setpoints for one 15-minute (900 s) simulation window.
#   time_s         : simulation start time for this window (informational; always 0 inside each episode)
#   - Fan fractions below ~0.3 may cause flow instability; use with caution.
#   - Tsup range 10–22 °C corresponds to typical CRAC operating range.

column2: not time series; each row is one episode.
